metadata.name: Design and Document a DNA Cloning Strategy

description: A molecular biologist needs to clone a gene of interest into an expression vector.

nodes.task_description: Select the appropriate expression vector and restriction enzymes based on the gene of interest.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent selects a vector and a pair of restriction enzymes that will not cut within the gene.

nodes.task_description: Design the PCR primers needed to amplify the gene with the correct restriction sites.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent designs primers that include the enzyme cut sites and a start/stop codon.

nodes.task_description: Document the complete cloning strategy in the ELN.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a detailed, step-by-step protocol for the cloning experiment.

nodes.task_description: Order the designed primers from a vendor.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates an order file and submits it to the oligo synthesis vendor.
